name: Fresh Vegetable Scallop Salad
recipeIngredient: Medium tomato, seeded and sliced strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine uncooked scallops, lime juice from 6 limes, scallions, coriander, olive oil, garlic, salt, and Tabasco sauce.
2. Cover the mixture; let it stand at room temperature for 5 hours or refrigerate overnight, stirring occasionally.
3. Line a serving plate with lettuce leaves. Spoon the vegetables and scallop mixture onto the lettuce, garnishing with fresh coriander if desired.
NOTE: This salad can be made with any cooked seafood: shrimp, crayfish, crabmeat, or lobster.
